title: Hotel Listing
description: Hotel or lodging property listing with pricing, amenities, and availability from a booking platform.

property_name.description: Name of the hotel or lodging property. Commonly found in: Booking.com, Expedia, Hotels.com, hotel website.

chain_or_brand.description: Hotel chain or brand affiliation. Commonly found in: Booking.com, hotel website.

property_type.description: Type of lodging property. Commonly found in: Booking.com property type, listing metadata.

star_rating.description: Official star rating of the property. Commonly found in: Booking.com, hotel website, official classification.

address.description: Street address of the property. Commonly found in: Booking.com, hotel website, Google Maps.

city.description: City where the property is located. Commonly found in: Booking.com, hotel website.

country.description: Country where the property is located. Commonly found in: Booking.com, hotel website.

latitude.description: Latitude coordinate of the property. Commonly found in: Google Maps, geocoding API.

longitude.description: Longitude coordinate of the property. Commonly found in: Google Maps, geocoding API.

amenities.description: List of property amenities. Commonly found in: Booking.com amenities, hotel website facilities.

room_types.description: Available room types with pricing. Commonly found in: Booking.com room options, hotel website rooms page.

cancellation_policy.description: Cancellation policy description. Commonly found in: Booking.com policies, hotel website.

check_in_time.description: Standard check-in time. Commonly found in: Booking.com hotel info, hotel website.

check_out_time.description: Standard check-out time. Commonly found in: Booking.com hotel info, hotel website.

pet_policy.description: Pet policy description. Commonly found in: Booking.com policies, hotel website.

parking_available.description: Whether parking is available on-site. Commonly found in: Booking.com amenities, hotel website.

breakfast_included.description: Whether breakfast is included in the rate. Commonly found in: Booking.com, hotel website.

review_score.description: Overall guest review score. Commonly found in: Booking.com review score, TripAdvisor.

review_count.description: Total number of guest reviews. Commonly found in: Booking.com, TripAdvisor.

platform.description: Booking platform where this listing was found. Commonly found in: scraper metadata, URL pattern.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

RoomType.description: A specific room type available at the property.

availability.description: Whether the room type is currently available.
